This item is found by foraging.
This item is found by fishing.
This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Rat Ear Pie
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Fish Eggs (Evergreen Salmon) (Fishing, 135 trivial)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Scars of Velious
    Yield: 2 x Fish Eggs, 2 x Fish Scales
  • Fish Eggs (Greengill Salmon) (Fishing, 135 trivial)
    • Class: ALL
    Expansion: Scars of Velious
    Yield: 2 x Fish Eggs, 2 x Fish Scales

    • Class: ALL

a grimfang minnow

Merchants


Vendor listing - Premium only

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Crescent Reach
Quest Name
Bristlebane Day - Even More Fun

Erudin
Quest Name
Divine Protector's Armguards

West Freeport
Quest Name
Ordained Helm
Used in 2 recipes.
Recipe list - Premium only.
Component required for the spell Enduring Breath. It can be fished in almost every zone and is often found on vendors near popular fishing spots.


Uploaded April 3rd, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Can Be Bought From NPCs
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2023 at 7:53 AM Rating: Decent
KirshuLeshi
6 posts
Fish Scales can be purchased from the reagent vendor in the Guild Lobby. East side, on your right as you enter the room.

Fish Scales can be purchased from the reagent vendor in the Guild Lobby. East side, on your right as you enter the room.

Fish Scales can be vendor bought in Katta. From Master Nemetis (General Supplies). /loc is -766, -381, -101.
Down where all the Merchants are with elite spells and energians.

from: http://www.eqtraders.com/items/show_item.php?item=7262

Quote:
This item can be Vendor Purchased:

Abysmal Sea
Yoen Ormard @ 107, 19, 98, in the hold
Tasec Dreeng @ -80, 205, 98, in the hold
Duath Untez @ -60, 240, 98

Commonlands
Katha Firespinner @ 167.64, -368.50, Next t3rd Inn

Crescent Reach
Merchant Kaphiri @ -1470, -1614, -88
Innkeeper Seltu @ -1527, -1564, -86
Merchant Wyn`las @ -1404, -1520, -88

Dulak's Harbor
a swabby bait salesman @ -463, -514, 5

East Commonlands
Pardor the Blessed @ -121, -780, -46, first building on left after zoning out from West Freeport

East Freeport
Farista Eniatia @ 97, 119, 26
Palrion Enieus @ 262, 198, 31
Eroncil Rellyus @ 292, 199, 31

Erudin Palace
Frena Runeflash @ 732, 953, 86, On 4th floor of Tower of the Gatecallers, top section of Palace
Jeliala Glimmercharm @ 507, 765, 86, On 4th floor of Tower of Craftkeepers, top section of Palace
Tika Shockstep @ 917, 721, 86, On 4th floor of Tower of the Crimson Hands, top section of Palace

Gulf of Gunthak
Muxzog Gradok @ 1425, -202, 3

Jaggedpine Forest
Selia Wetstone @ 1115, 2049, -11
Quartermaster Grarucks @ -1107, 3234, 4

Kael Drakkel
Ymik @ -1740, 1932, -140, Behind King Tormax. You must have good Tormax (not Kromriff and/or Kromzek) faction tshop with this and surrounding merchants.

Kerra Isle
Melixis @ 519, 179, 18

Kithicor Woods
Jeena Firechaser @ -216, 3813, 498

Oggok
Hrak @ 821, 849, 41, first room inside righthand midlevel tunnel of Komarr's Caves

Shadow Haven
Hintol Balkortak @ -441, 1389, -54, Near pottery wheel

Toxxulia Forest
Cyria Lorewhisper @ 1800, -719, -68

West Freeport
Zasrin Blueflame @ -212, -954, 141, upstairs in Academy of Arcane Science
Lysin Smokkan @ -246, -914, -77, in Academy of Arcane Science
Lysa Truegreen @ -226, -948, 141, Academy of Arcane Sciences

No longer available in PoK, by the pond.. This really sux.. Especially for lower level players.. :-( Think this is a real same to make it so hard to find fish scales... There is a trader at Western buildings that sells fish scales. It's one of the dudes fishing there; not the barbarian - the other guy.

There is a fishing trough in Western POK, between the Guild Hall and the Bazaar. You can fish there and get the usual: fish, fish scales, etc.

Sage
950 posts
Depends on your CHA and Faction of course. Bat wings sell for more, but it's amazing how you can sell both fish scales and bat wings in the Bazaar for 5gp each! It's like 90% profit or more, if you buy them in Freeport and sell them in the Bazaar.
